# Monthly Assessment Scorecards

Generated by the **Monthly Assessment** workflow (`.github/workflows/monthly-assessment.yaml`, DOC-2472). Each month the
workflow adds two files here:

- `YYYY-MM.json`: the machine record (per-page persona, verdict, score, gaps). **This is the source of truth for the
  rolling three-month trend** shown on the Confluence scorecard page. Do not edit by hand.
- `YYYY-MM.md`: the human-readable scorecard for that month (also the fallback when Confluence publishing is not
  configured).

The workflow commits these files via an automated PR (`chore/monthly-assessment`). Merge that PR to keep the trend
history in the repository. Assigning page owners and curating the quick-wins list from each scorecard remain manual team
steps.
